calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Petition For Order Accepting Resignation Of Trustee And For Appointment Of Successor Co-Trustees (Original Petition Filed In Consolidated Case Ptr-22-305373 On May-25-2022. Amended Petition Filed On Nov-02-2022)
Off Calendar Feb-06-2023 Granted Per Written Order

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Petition For Order Accepting Resignation Of Trustee And For Appointment Of Successor Co-Trustees (Original Petition Filed In Consolidated Case Ptr-22-305373 On May-25-2022. Amended Petition Filed On Nov-02-2022.)
Off Calendar Jan-09-2023 Continued To Feb-06-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Amended Petition For Confirmation Of Successor Trustee
Off Calendar Mar-25-2008 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jack Bonanno for and with Melissa Shanley (Objector Beneficiary and Respondent); Marry Gillick and Charlotte Ito for Jane Davies (petitioner).

The Court noted to Counsel that no Order was signed on Jan. 29, 2008 and that there was no order to vacate. Ms. Ito informed the court that she never submiited the Order. The Court will vacate the minute order. Ms. Gillick stated that the settlor appointed Ms. Davies and that grounds must be asserted for her removal. Mr. Bonanno stated that Ms. Davies had no standing and that the beneficiary had the right to be appointed as Trustee. The parties presented argument in support of their positions. The matter was taken under submission.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera/ S. Ravinantapricha. Bailiff: Deputy F. Smith.

Petition For Order Appointing Successor Trustee
Off Calendar Mar-25-2008 Granted Per Written Order

Petition To Vacate Order Confirming Successor Trustee
Off Calendar Mar-25-2008 Text Ruling

Petition For Confirmation Of Successor Trustee
Off Calendar Mar-25-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Charlotte Ito for Jane Davis (Petitioner).

Ms. Ito stated that Ms. Shanley was being represented by John McNamara, and that she had not been able to communicate with him. The Court noted that no opposition had been received and that Melissa Shanley was not present at this hearing. The petition was granted. Counsel will prepare the order.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Helen Sorep-Matley CSR 225. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. Lee.
